shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "rg -n 'async fn get_time_entries|trait ApiClient|MockApiClient' src/api/client.rs && sed -n '40,210p' src/api/client.rs && sed -n '1370,1510p' src/api/client.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "git log --all --oneline --decorate -15 && rg -n 'duration' src/commands src/utilities.rs | head -100 && sed -n '1,180p' src/utilities.rs && sed -n '1,160p' Cargo.toml"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n -A90 -B10 'normalize_time_entry_list_filters' src/utilities.rs && sed -n '640,760p' src/arguments.rs && sed -n '1,130p' src/main.rs && sed -n '1,120p' src/commands/list.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '230,285p' src/api/client.rs && rg -n 'impl TimeEntry|is_running|Default for TimeEntry|get_duration' src/models.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/arguments.rs src/main.rs src/commands/mod.rs src/commands/bill_weekly.rs'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt && cargo test --bin toggl && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check && git diff --check'
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/arguments.rs src/main.rs src/commands/mod.rs && sed -n '1,180p' src/commands/bill_weekly.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt && cargo test --bin toggl && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check && git diff --check && cargo test --no-run'
/bin/bash -lc "git diff --check && git status --short && rg -n -C 2 'BillWeekly|WeeklyBilling|json' src/arguments.rs src/main.rs src/commands/bill_weekly.rs | head -100"
